about.title: About
about.subtitle: TABIBI is a modern online medical appointment platform that bridges the gap between patients and healthcare providers, making quality healthcare accessible with just a few clicks.
about.mission_p1: To revolutionize healthcare access by providing a seamless, secure, and efficient platform for booking medical appointments. We strive to connect patients with the right doctors at the right time.
about.mission_p2: Founded with the belief that booking a doctor's appointment should be as simple as ordering food online, TABIBI has grown to serve thousands of patients and hundreds of healthcare providers.
about.values_subtitle: What drives everything we do at TABIBI
about.value1_desc: Every decision we make revolves around improving the patient experience and health outcomes.
about.value2_desc: Your health data is encrypted and protected with industry-leading security standards.
about.value3_desc: We believe quality healthcare should be accessible to everyone, everywhere.
about.value4_desc: We partner only with verified, qualified healthcare professionals.
about.cta_subtitle: Experience healthcare the modern way — fast, easy, and reliable.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us more about your question...
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.faq1_q: How do I book an appointment?
contact.faq1_a: Search for a doctor, select an available time slot, and confirm your booking.
contact.faq2_a: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule from your dashboard up to 2 hours before.
contact.faq3_q: How do I join as a doctor?
contact.faq3_a: Sign up as a doctor and our team will verify your credentials within 24-48 hours.
contact.faq4_a: Absolutely. All data is encrypted and stored securely following industry standards.
contact.cta_subtitle: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 8AM to 6PM. We usually respond within a few hours.
